mapper.select: select a.id as rsvnId, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.room_id, b.room_name, b.capacity, a.user_id, c.real_name, c.mobile, a.dept_id, d.dept_name, a.title, a.user_count, a.status from mr_reservation a left join mr_room b on a.room_id = b.id left join mr_user c on a.user_id = c.id left join mr_dept d on a.dept_id = d.id where a.start_time >= #{startTime} and a.end_time <= #{endTime}
